violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Slicer taken out of service to be cleaned and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/25/2025
ROP tuna was observed thawing with packaging intact, temperature of 39-40 degrees. Disposed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/25/2025
Trash and other debris was observed on the ground around the dumpster area. New Violation. Correct By: 07/09/2025
A hole was observed in the floor in the chemical storage room. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 07/02/2025

The floor/wall junctures in the dry storage area has an accumulation of old rodent droppings debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 07/02/2025
